zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Everingham於1331年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾素維爾時，她的父親Adam Everingham24歲，母親Joan d'Eiville16歲。她於1351年與Sir Hugh de Hastings在英國諾福爾可艾爾辛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年11月26日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可艾爾辛享年44歲，埋葬在英國越可爾多卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Everingham于1331年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾素維爾时，她的父亲Adam Everingham24岁，母亲Joan d'Eiville16岁。她于1351年与Sir Hugh de Hastings在英国諾福爾可艾爾辛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年11月26日在英国英格兰諾福爾可艾爾辛享年44岁，埋葬在英国越可爾多卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Everingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name from Everingham (East Yorkshire), named in Old English Yferingaham ‘homestead (hām) of the people (-inga-) of Eofor’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Everingham was born in 1331, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Adam Everingham, was 24 and her mother, Joan d'Eiville, was 16. She married Sir Hugh de Hastings in 1351, in Elsing, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 26 November 1375, in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Everingham est née en 1331, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Adam Everingham, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan d'Eiville, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh de Hastings en 1351, à Elsing, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 novembre 1375, à Elsing, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Everingham 1331 in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Everingham 24 und ihre Mutter Joan d'Eiville 16. Sie hat 1351 in Elsing, Norfolk, England Sir Hugh de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. November 1375 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Everingham è nata il nel 1331 nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Adam Everingham, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan d'Eiville, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh de Hastings nel 1351, nel Elsing, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 novembre 1375, nel Elsing, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Doncaster, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Everinghamが1331年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルで生まれた時，父Adam Everinghamは24歳，母Joan d'Eivilleは16歳であった。1351年にイギリスノーフォルクエルシングでSir Hugh de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年11月26日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエルシングで44歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Everingham(이)가 1331년 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Everingham(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan d'Eiville(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1351년 영국 노르폴크 엘징에서 Sir Hugh de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 11월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 엘징에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Everingham nasceu em 1331, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Everingham, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan d'Eiville, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh de Hastings em 1351, em Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1375, em Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Everingham родилась в 1331 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam Everingham было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan d'Eiville, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh de Hastings в 1351 г. в местности элсинг, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 ноября 1375 г. в местности элсинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Everingham nació en 1331, en Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Everingham, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan d'Eiville, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh de Hastings en 1351, en Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1375, en Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
